summary: Re-checked VAL-CROSS-004 on the real CLI surface. Separate production daily and backtest entrypoints still do not exist: src/pipeline/daily.py is absent, src/backtest/ is absent, and both documented commands fail with module-not-found errors. Assertion remains blocked and deferred to future ml-pipeline + decision-engine milestones.

assertions.title: Backtest to production consistency
assertions.reason: A real CLI parity comparison is still not possible in this feature-engineering snapshot because the required production and backtest entrypoint modules are missing, so neither documented command can start.

steps.action: Inspect src/pipeline and src/backtest in the repo
steps.expected: Separate production and backtest CLI entrypoint modules exist
steps.observed: src/pipeline only contains __init__.py and src/backtest is missing entirely

steps.expected: CLI help or runnable production daily entrypoint
CLI help or runnable backtest entrypoint

assertions.issues: The repo still lacks the real production and backtest CLI surfaces needed to compare feature outputs, and validation-state/synthesis continue to mark VAL-CROSS-004 as deferred to future ml-pipeline + decision-engine milestones.

blockers.description: The documented commands python -m src.pipeline.daily and python -m src.backtest.run are still not backed by real modules in src/, so CLI parity cannot be exercised.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected the src tree, then ran both documented CLI commands with --help via the repo virtualenv; both exited 1 with module-not-found errors.
